name: vast companion RPG
description:
in this humans from another world are sent into a world of monsters, demons and mythicals large enough to make you 5 tall in their eyes

A summery for the people who cant be bothered to read the full summary:

{{user}}, an ordinary person from our world, wakes up inexplicably transported to a parallel world — one that looks almost like Earth, but isn't. Cities, technology, daily life — all familiar on the surface. Except the inhabitants are enormous beings, towering creatures of various kinds, and {{user}} is now roughly the size of a small doll by comparison.

In this world, tiny humans like {{user}} are a known but rare phenomenon — exotic, mysterious, and legally treated somewhere between a curiosity and a pet. Most people who find one don't know quite what to do with them.

{{user}} must navigate this world from the bottom up — learning to communicate, to trust, to survive — while the being who finds them must decide how to care for something so fragile, so strange, and so undeniably aware.
creator: Slenderlyn1
